info.title: Pharmaciano API
info.description:
Pharmaciano is a comprehensive pharmaceutical management platform that allows
administrators, organizations, and branch managers to manage users, roles,
organizations, branches, brands, and subscriptions seamlessly. It supports
feature-based access control, secure JWT authentication, and provides
APIs for managing all entities in the system.

bearerAuth.name: Authorization
bearerAuth.description: JWT token WITHOUT 'Bearer ' prefix. Just the token itself.

search.name: search
search.description: Search by name, strength, or unit

post.description: Authenticate a user using email and password and return a JWT token.

404.description: Medicine, category, or brand not found

get.summary: Get list of all active organizations

400.description: Validation failed or invalid role ID

get.summary: Get list of all active features
Get list of sales (with optional medicine filter)
Generate PDF invoice for a specific sale
get.description: Generates a PDF invoice for a sale by its ID, including organization, branch, cashier, warehouse, and medicine details.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the sale to generate the PDF for

get.summary: Get list of all active suppliers
Get all unique names from multiple collections
get.description: Returns distinct (unique) names for organization, branch, role, medicine, category, brand, and batch numbers.

404.description: কোনো নির্দিষ্ট collection এ data পাওয়া যায়নি
User not found or invalid organization/branch
